title: Artiz simple modpack
description: Mainly quality of life, performance and technical mods, nothing too op/bloat
body:
This simple modpack includes quality of life mods like minihud that allows you to have info lines on screen without opening f3, technical mods like litematica that allows you to build anything you like using schematics and performance mods like sodium which makes your gameplay feel alot smoother.

This pack isn't too bloated and doesn't include anything that drastically changes the normal minecraft gameplay. It has good balance of anything you could need whether you are interested in the technical aspect of the game or just want to make certain things in the game little bit easier. Configure the mods however you like!


Mods included:
- cubes without borders
- fabric api
- iris
- litematica
- lithium
- malilib
- midnightlib
- minihud
- mousetweaks
- ok zoomer
- reeses sodium options
- sodim extra
- sodium
- tweakeroo
- continuity
- techultis
- xaeros world map
